name: Metamorphosis
summary:
An Extraordinary Journey Through a Surreal World

Ever wonder what it's like to be a bug? Become Gregor, who transforms into a tiny cockroach in a gigantic world! 

Armed with only your wit and strange new appendages, embark on a mind-bending journey to unravel the mystery behind your metamorphosis.

Welcome to a World Unlike Any Other

In this surreal first person adventure-platformer, everyday objects loom like towering giants, while dizzying heights challenge your step, and each turn begins a new...
